violations.text: Scissors were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen & dining room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the reach-in freezer has an accumulation of frost buildup. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
The floor under and around the fryers are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

The floor and wall coving in the ware washing area is in poor repair, observed incomplete seal. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

Batter was observed held at 55 and 57 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per staff, batter was recently prepared. Batter was placed into shallow pans and into the freezer to chill. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

The refuse area, and the area between refuse area and storage shed has an accumulation of soil residue and debris. Refuse areas must be maintained clean and free of debris to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
The floor under and around the fryers are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application provided to PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (chicken marinator) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC cleaned and sanitized equipment during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Tenders were observed held at 116 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Tenders were filled above the fill-line of container. Tenders under fill line were 146 degrees. Items were disposed per establishment protocol. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Chicken batter was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Staff divided container of batter and placed in walk-in freezer to rapidly cool. Ice was added to ice bath at the battering station. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the back room and side dining room are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

Sensor at hand sink in dish room is in poor repair. Per PIC, the sensor was in poor repair and water was turned off. PIC turned water service on during inspection Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The refuse area, and the area between refuse area and storage shed, has an accumulation of litter, boxes, and debris. Refuse areas must be maintained clean and free of debris to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

The following was observed to be in poor repair: -The floor under the friers -Moulding near walk-in COB 05/14/24. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

The floor drains under the 3-bay sink and under the beverage self-service station have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Spanish Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

Batter was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023
Staff observed wearing jewelry. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the biscuit warmer, counter between front service line and biscuit warmer, and frozen lemonade machine have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

The dumpster area and parking lot in front of it has an accumulation grease - the solid waste from straining fryer grease. The dumpster area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility, especially by the soda dispenser near the drive thru window, beneath fryers, and beneath ice machine have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris and/or water. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023
